title: Identity Vector — Full Environment Audit
scope: Active Directory service accounts, Kerberos encryption, and credential-access exposure
summary: Identity vector risks increased 14% this week. Focus on SPN-bearing service accounts, RC4-enabled principals, and Kerberos roasting exposure.

items.title: Audit all accounts with SPNs
items.description: Inventory svc_* and legacy SQL/backup principals with registered SPNs.
items.finding: 12 service accounts with SPNs; 3 still allow RC4.

items.title: Enforce AES encryption for Kerberos
items.description: Disable RC4 and require AES-256 for service ticket encryption.
items.finding: svc_sql_prod vulnerable to offline TGS cracking.

items.title: Review AS-REP roastable accounts
items.finding: 2 stale accounts flagged in last pentest run.

items.title: Validate DCSync replication rights
items.finding: Linked to open case PX-D034471 / alert A-1455.

items.title: krbtgt rotation schedule
items.description: Golden ticket recovery requires double krbtgt reset.

items.title: TGS-REQ anomaly monitoring
items.description: SIEM rules for unusual TGS volume per user toward rare SPNs.
items.finding: Sigma rule R-21 approved; coverage gap on HR-DC01 segment.
